narrative:
Issa Diop is a centre-back for Morocco, currently holding an impressive overall rating of 7.16/10. This places him among the top 5% of centre-backs competing in this World Cup. His rating reflects a strong overall profile, with 74% of it derived from consistent club form over the last two seasons.

His defensive contributions are clear, with 4.884 clearances and 1.163 interceptions per 90 minutes at this World Cup. Remarkably, Diop has also scored 0.233 goals per 90 minutes in the tournament, significantly outperforming his 0.041 expected goals per 90 minutes. This suggests efficiency in front of goal despite limited attacking involvement.

Diop serves as a vital defensive anchor for Morocco, demonstrating consistent performance backed by 74% of his rating from club form. Scouts and fans should continue to observe his dominant aerial presence and timely interventions in the defensive third. Any further goal contributions will be a bonus, given his low expected goals.
